steps: Go to https://dashboard.workos.com and sign in or create a free account
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys' (or navigate directly to https://dashboard.workos.com/api-keys)
Your Staging environment comes with an API key pre-generated — copy it for sandbox testing
To create a Production API key, click 'Generate New Key' in the Production section
Give the key a descriptive name
Copy the key immediately — Production keys are shown only once
Use the key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header of all API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (Secret Key)
credential_fields.description: Your WorkOS secret key, prefixed with sk_ (used as Bearer token in Authorization header)

notes: Free tier available — includes unlimited SSO connections for testing and development
Staging keys are prefixed with sk_staging_ and Production keys with sk_live_
Production API keys are shown only once — save them immediately
The Client ID (prefixed with client_) is also available on the API Keys page and is required for SSO flows

test_endpoint.description: List organizations to verify the API key
